bug_report.summary: Preferences dialog shows disabled “Cancel” button after confirming “Reset preferences”
steps_to_reproduce: Confirm the reset in the confirmation dialog
expected_behaviors: After resetting preferences, the Preferences dialog should remain usable (e.g., both Cancel and Save enabled) or close automatically, allowing the user to exit without being forced into a Save-only flow.
actual_behaviors: After confirming the reset, the Preferences dialog remains open but the “Cancel” button is disabled/greyed out while “Save” is still enabled (as shown in the after screenshot).
